infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HaulFlow uses the camera so drivers can capture proof-of-delivery (POD) and bill-of-lading (BOL) photos at pickup and drop-off.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HaulFlow accesses your photo library so drivers can attach existing POD or BOL photos to a load.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: HaulFlow saves POD and BOL photos to your photo library when requested.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HaulFlow uses your location to show your truck on the fleet map and to record GPS pings during active loads.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: HaulFlow uses your location in the background to keep your truck position updated on the fleet map while a load is active.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: HaulFlow may access the microphone for voice features in the driver portal.
